# hwpx-ts LLM Guide

This file is a concise, LLM-friendly reference for using this repository.

## Repository Purpose

`hwpx-ts` is a TypeScript monorepo for HWPX document workflows:

- Parse and edit HWPX (`@masteroflearning/hwpxcore`)
- Render/edit in React (`@masteroflearning/hwpxeditor`)
- Expose HWPX tools through MCP (`@masteroflearning/hwpx-mcp`)

## Primary Package: @masteroflearning/hwpxcore

Install:

```bash
npm install @masteroflearning/hwpxcore
```

Basic import:

```ts
import { HwpxDocument, HwpxPackage, TextExtractor } from "@masteroflearning/hwpxcore";
```

### Core APIs

Open and save:

```ts
const doc = await HwpxDocument.open(hwpxBytes);
const out1 = await doc.save();          // Uint8Array
const out2 = await doc.saveToBuffer();  // Uint8Array
const blob = await doc.saveToBlob();    // Blob
await doc.saveToPath("./out.hwpx");    // Node.js path
```

Read/modify content:

```ts
doc.sections;
doc.paragraphs;
doc.text;

doc.addParagraph("new paragraph");
doc.insertParagraphAt(0, 0, "inserted");
doc.removeParagraph(0, 0);
doc.replaceText("old", "new");
```

Structured objects:

```ts
doc.tables;
doc.headers;
doc.memos;
```

Formatting helpers:

```ts
const charPrId = doc.ensureRunStyle({ bold: true, fontSize: 12 });
const paraPrId = doc.ensureParaStyle({ alignment: "center" });
```

Image/equation insertion:

```ts
doc.addImage(imageBytes, {
  mediaType: "image/png",
  widthMm: 100,
  heightMm: 80,
});

doc.addEquation("E=mc^2");
```

Version/metadata/lifecycle:

```ts
doc.libraryVersion;
doc.documentVersionInfo;
doc.closed;
doc.close();
```

Low-level package APIs:

```ts
const pkg = await HwpxPackage.open(hwpxBytes);
pkg.partNames();
pkg.getPart("Contents/header.xml");
pkg.rootfiles();
pkg.mainRootFile();
pkg.versionPath();
pkg.close();
```

### Compatibility Notes

- ZIP save writes `mimetype` as first entry with `STORE` compression.
- XML serialization prefers HWPX prefixes (`hp`, `hs`, `hc`, `hh`).
- Package fallback warnings can be captured via `HwpxPackage.setWarningHandler(...)`.

## MCP Package: @masteroflearning/hwpx-mcp

Run server:

```bash
npx @masteroflearning/hwpx-mcp
```

Available MCP tools:

- `hwpx_read`: extract plain text
- `hwpx_export`: export as `md` or `txt`
- `hwpx_extract_xml`: extract internal XML part
- `hwpx_info`: return structure metadata
- `hwpx_batch_index`: index one or many HWPX files for AI/RAG pipelines

Claude Desktop config snippet:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "hwpx": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["@masteroflearning/hwpx-mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

## Safe Usage Patterns for Agents

- Prefer `saveToBuffer()` in generic environments.
- Use `saveToPath()` only in Node.js runtime with filesystem access.
- Call `doc.close()`/`pkg.close()` when done in long-running processes.
- Handle missing/non-standard parts gracefully; fallback warnings are informative.

## Development Commands (Repo)

```bash
pnpm --filter @masteroflearning/hwpxcore test
pnpm --filter @masteroflearning/hwpxcore typecheck
pnpm --filter @masteroflearning/hwpxcore build
pnpm --filter @masteroflearning/hwpx-tools test
pnpm --filter @masteroflearning/hwpx-mcp exec vitest run --passWithNoTests
```
